## Custom template

**Template name:** `Custom issue`  
**About:** `Open a general task, question or maintenance issue.`  
**Issue default title:** `[Task]: `  
**Labels:** `triage`

**Template content:**

```md
## Summary

<!-- What needs to be discussed, changed or decided? -->

## Issue type

<!-- Pick one: documentation, refactor, build/CI, release, validation, design discussion, maintenance, question, other. -->

## Details

<!-- Add relevant context, constraints, links or examples. -->

## Definition of done

<!-- What should be true before this issue is closed? -->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Risks or compatibility notes

<!-- Mention API, persistence, determinism, packaging or documentation risks. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else useful for triage. -->
